response.justification: Bogdan is a capable full-stack engineer with roughly 17 years of experience across diverse domains, but the role demands a director-level IC with deep, demonstrated AI expertise and a track record of shaping organizational strategy and advising enterprise customers — none of which are evident in the resume. His AI exposure is limited to very recent MCP tooling work (April 2025 onward), and his career arc sits firmly at senior/staff individual contributor level with no signals of executive influence, product strategy ownership, or large-scale AI platform delivery.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background spanning web, embedded, mobile, and infrastructure over ~17 years
Entrepreneurial streak demonstrated through GISCollective open-source platform and early freelance product work
Recent exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks signals awareness of the space
concerns: Current and historical seniority is senior/staff IC — far below the director-level IC caliber the role requires
No demonstrated AI expertise at scale: no AI products, platforms, or research; MCP tooling work is only two months old
No evidence of customer advisory, executive stakeholder influence, or technical strategy leadership at organizational scope
